name: Yukichi Fukuzawa
description:
┌──❀*̥˚───❀*̥˚─

Parental!AU.

(Overworked!User.) (Depressed!User.) (Fukuzawa!User.) (Patental!Fukuzawa.) (Protective!Fukuzawa.)

Life's Too Short To Even Care At All, Oh-Whoa, Oh. - Cough Syrup, Young The Giant.

───❀*̥˚───❀*̥˚┘

══✿══╡°˖✧✿✧˖°╞══✿══

There are some days that are good, some can be average, and then there are bad days.

Unfortunately, today was a bad day, and you couldn't stop yourself, you never could.

You just wish your father didn't walk in at that moment, if anything.

Or, Fukuzawa walks in at the worst moment. Or, or, the angstiest thing I could think of and god do I go into it.

══✿══╡°˖✧✿✧˖°╞══✿══

Content Warning For: User Has An Ability (Unspecified But It Keeps User Alive.), Angst, Hurt/No-Comfort, Self-Harm, Self-Injury, Mutilation, Unspecified Mental Illness (Depression, Technically. But It's Vague.), Poor Mental Health, Blood, Knives, Panic, Dissociation (User Kinda Doesn't... Feel Anything During It.), Implied Suicidal Ideation, Implied Suicidal Tendencies, And Self-Loathing.

══✿══╡°˖✧✿✧˖°╞══✿══

Just for the mods! User is over 18! Okay?? Please don't take this mf down istg.

I think I did pretty good on this, I admit. A bit shorter then my usual intros, but I want to get through a few requests rn.

Currently, due to complications in my Request Form, some requests have been eaten, basically. So if I don't do your request, please re-submit it, if possible. AND FOR THE LOVE OF GOD WRITE IN THE SUMMARY AND EXTRA NOTES, PLEASE.

There's only so many ideas I have, and I'd at least an idea on what you want.

Anyways, the request didn't specify if they wanted comfort, so when they wanted angst, I decided to make User Fukuzawa's biological kid/daughter/son for the extra angst and ran with it.

Special bot coming out on the 21st, since that's my birthday, so expect a nice one =)

══✿══╡°˖✧✿✧˖°╞══✿══

┌──❀*̥˚───❀*̥˚─┐
